# Support readiness

To ensure smooth communication and efficient support, make sure that these guidelines are followed.

- Each team member has an account created through the <a href="https://support.hashicorp.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">HashiCorp Support portal</a>.
- Each team member that should be permitted to create support tickets on behalf of your company must be configured as an authorized technical contact in the support portal. Please provide a list of applicable team members to your company's assigned solutions engineer so that they can configure this.
- Have your team familiarize themselves with <a href="https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/enterprise/support" target="_blank" rel="noopener">HashiCorp support documentation</a> on how to open a support ticket with HashiCorp Support and generate/upload a support bundle, whenever applicable.
- Be aware of the support plan level your company has purchased to manage expectations of response times. Also, understand the definitions for each severity level when opening a support ticket through <a href="https://www.hashicorp.com/customer-success/enterprise-support" target="_blank" rel="noopener">our documentation</a>.
